description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/clarin-eric/build-image:1.3.5 with a docker:28.1.1-dind service and Docker environment variables (DOCKER_CERT_PATH, DOCKER_DRIVER, DOCKER_HOST, DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR, DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY, GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY). Define stages lint, build, test, security, and release. Add a lint-dockerfile job in the lint stage that runs `timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --lint-docker` and uses the default tag. Add a shell-check job in the lint stage that runs `timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --lint-shell`. Add a build job in the build stage that runs `timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --build`, uses the docker tag, and uploads all untracked files as artifacts. Add a test job in the test stage that depends on the build job, runs `timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --test`, and uses the docker tag. Add two security jobs: informative-vulnerability-scan runs `timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --scan` with allow_failure true and variable SCAN_SEVERITY_THRESHOLD=low; normative-vulnerability-scan runs the same command with allow_failure false, variables SCAN_FAIL_ON=all and SCAN_SEVERITY_THRESHOLD=high, and uses the docker tag. Finally add a release job in the release stage that runs `timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --release`, uses the docker tag, and is limited to tags and pipeline triggers.
